daily.today_energy: Your vibe is grounded but restless—like you're ready to shake things up. Mercury's whispering that it's time to trust your gut and lean into what feels real, even if it's unconventional.
daily.love: Someone's energy is shifting toward you, and honestly? They've been noticing you longer than you realize. If you're single, a meaningful conversation is brewing. If coupled, tonight's the night to get vulnerable.
daily.career: That project you've been sitting on? It's calling for your attention. Your creative problem-solving is unmatched right now, and people are watching. Show up authentically and let your work speak.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and grounding—think walks outside or stretching that's actually mindful, not rushed. Energy flows when you slow down and actually feel what you're doing.

weekly.overview: Mercury's got your back this week, Taurus. Your vibe is shifting from introspective to outward-focused, making it the perfect time to share what you've been cooking up. Trust the momentum.
weekly.love: There's a tenderness in the air around you. Whether you're coupled or solo, someone's noticing your energy. Don't overthink it—just be your authentic self and let things unfold naturally.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now. This is your moment to pitch that thing you've been sitting on. Your confidence is contagious, and people are genuinely interested in what you're building.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more movement and less numbing. Take walks, stretch, dance—whatever feels good. Your nervous system wants grounding rituals. Self-care isn't selfish; it's necessary.
